top_risks: CLIENT-REJECT (sev 8): The 'raster logo' is a clean, crisp AI-generated image with no visible JPEG artifacts, compression noise, or degradation — the handoff claims it was deliberately degraded to mimic a soft chatbot export, but it looks perfectly sharp. I never handed over my actual original file; this is a fabricated substitute, not my real asset. I cannot approve work based on a simulated stand-in.

AGENT CHOKE on 'logo_raster': image_vectorize will auto-trace a clean flat raster with smooth anti-aliased edges and produce bloated, over-anchored paths or miss subtle colour zones entirely — the 'degraded' premise the workflow depends on is false, so tracing thresholds will be miscalibrated from the start.
